top_signals.title: US Stocks Advance as Traders Parse CPI Data, Warsh Comments
top_signals.summary: US stocks rose on Tuesday as investors parsed latest inflation data and Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh’s remarks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Emerging Market Assets Rally as US CPI Data Trims Rate Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market assets rallied after a cooler-than-expected US inflation report prompted traders to pare bets on imminent Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes, boosting demand for riskier assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: NATO logistics, Ukrainian troops are top subjects of Russian camera hacks, advisory says
top_signals.summary: Dutch intelligence officials report that at least one Russian agency is compromising internet-connected cameras across Europe to spy on military logistics and Ukrainian personnel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Western Fuel Markets Flash Record Tightness on Hormuz Escalation
top_signals.summary: Fuel markets in the US and Europe are flashing record tightness as tensions flare up in the Middle East, threatening more pain for consumers already strained with high prices at the pump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CHART: Mining vs AI – Nvidia sneezes, sheds five BHPs
top_signals.summary: Nvidia lost a trillion dollars this quarter and briefly traded like a value stock. The world's 50 biggest miners, all $2.19 trillion of them, have looked like ones for years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

alerts.title: Politicians call for easing of private school stranglehold on elite rugby
alerts.summary: Politicians have called for an easing of the stranglehold private schools have on providing England with elite rugby players. Nearly two thirds of the matchday 23 that played Fiji at the weekend had some form of private or independent education, underlining concerns about the shortage of state-school pupils making it in the sport. Just last [...]

alerts.title: Boluda Corporación Marítima Inaugurates Rotterdam Headquarters
alerts.summary: Boluda Corporación Marítima has officially inaugurated its Netherlands headquarters in Rotterdam, located in the city's Maritime Quarter, a location that will serve as the center of operations in Northern Europe through its subsidiaries Boluda…
